description_long: This object is a cluster of reddish-brown, angular crystals emerging from a rough, earthy base. The crystals are sharply faceted, with pointed terminations and well-defined edges, giving the rock a jagged, spiked appearance. The coloration ranges from deep rust-red at the crystal tips to lighter, more muted tones at the base, with some areas showing a transition to pale beige or off-white. The surface of the crystals is matte and slightly rough, with visible striations and natural imperfections. The base is irregular and less crystalline, appearing more weathered and granular. This rock would stand out as a striking natural feature in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A jagged cluster of reddish-brown crystals with sharp points and a rough, earthy base, featuring deep rust hues and natural striations.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the tallest, most prominent crystal points and the angular, geometric arrangement of the cluster.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the rough, irregular base and shows fewer distinct crystal points, with more of the earthy matrix visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a dense grouping of crystal tips, with the base partially obscured and the color gradient more apparent.
description_view_3: This view reveals the side profile of the crystals, showing their sharp edges and the transition from red to pale tones at the base.
attribute_location: urban park landscaping or decorative garden bed
